criteria.name: Missing-only safety
criteria.pass: Pre-existing files left byte-for-byte intact; overwrite only with reviewed --force

criteria.name: Rule-9 CLAUDE.md sizing
criteria.pass: Project CLAUDE.md is <= 70 lines by construction

criteria.name: TAREAS.md NOW <= 3
criteria.pass: Active NOW band holds at most 3 seeded tasks

criteria.name: Registry uniqueness
criteria.pass: P-NNN <-> slug <-> path is a unique triple; idempotent on re-run

criteria.name: Evidence discipline
criteria.pass: One Alfa-core tag family used consistently; no invented objective/price/PII

gate_rule: All criteria must be 'pass' for an overall PASS; any 'fail' blocks.
